_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 0.1 nM NRG-1β inducing peak migration of B97 cells...NRG-1α had no statistically significant effect on the migration of the human cell lines (Fig. 7 G-I) or on the migration of murine B97 cells
details: NRG-1β at 0.1 nM induced peak migration enhancement, while NRG-1α had no statistically significant effect on migration
